title: #claude Chat vs. Cowork: Biggest 3 differences
summary: Claude Cowork is positioned as an upgraded version of Claude Chat with three key differences: direct file access from the user's computer without upload limits or file size caps, a larger context window that preserves conversation details longer, and direct output of ready-to-use files to the user's folder rather than chat-based answers.
